summary: Content tab feature testing complete. Backend: 12/12 tests passed for custom pages CRUD and config update APIs. Frontend: All features verified - Content tab visible with 4 sub-tabs (About Us, Footer, Custom Pages, Navigation), Tiptap rich text editors working, image upload field present, footer links CRUD working, custom pages CRUD working (create, edit, delete), navigation drag-and-drop UI present with visibility toggles, Save Settings persists all content fields.

backend_api: POST /api/config/pages - create custom page with auth
PUT /api/config/ - accepts navMenuOrder array with reordering
GET /api/config/{id} - returns defaults for new content fields
frontend_content_tab: 4 sub-tabs visible: About Us, Footer, Custom Pages, Navigation
About Us sub-tab: image upload field (input-aboutUsImage), upload button (upload-aboutUs-img-btn)
About Us sub-tab: 2 Tiptap rich text editors (About Us content + Opening Hours)
Footer sub-tab: add footer link button (add-footer-link-btn) works
Footer sub-tab: footer link rows with label/url fields
Custom Pages sub-tab: title input (input-pageTitle) with auto-slug generation
Custom Pages sub-tab: Tiptap content editor
Custom Pages sub-tab: create page button (create-page-btn)
Custom Pages sub-tab: page card appears in list after creation
Custom Pages sub-tab: edit/delete buttons on page cards
Navigation sub-tab: Home, Menu, About Us builtin items with drag handles
Navigation sub-tab: visibility toggle buttons for each nav item
Navigation sub-tab: custom page auto-added to navigation after creation
Save Settings button saves all content fields with success toast
integration: Custom page creation flow: fill form -> create -> appears in list + nav menu
Navigation visibility toggle: clicking changes eye icon (visible/hidden)
Data persistence: saved settings persist after reload

critical_code_review_comments: Tiptap console warning: 'Duplicate extension names found: [link, underline]'. Not affecting functionality but may indicate redundant extension imports in Tiptap setup.
Slug auto-generation works well but consider adding validation for duplicate slugs on the backend.

success_rate.frontend: 100% (All Content tab features verified via Playwright)

seed_data_creation: Created test custom page 'TEST_Terms and Conditions' during UI testing (deleted after test)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Content tab feature complete. Backend has /api/config/pages endpoints for CRUD. Frontend ContentTab.jsx uses Tiptap for rich text, @dnd-kit for drag-and-drop navigation reordering. All 4 sub-tabs working: About Us (image + 2 rich editors), Footer (text + links array), Custom Pages (full CRUD), Navigation (drag-reorder + visibility toggles). Custom pages auto-add to navMenuOrder. Save Settings button persists all content fields.

fix_applied.issue: TextStyle import syntax error causing webpack compilation failure
fix_applied.fix: Changed import to named import: import { TextStyle } from '@tiptap/extension-text-style'
